title: Steampunk Guidance — The Mechanism
description: Sprocket points the party toward the Grand Mechanism at the center of Cogsworth Junction.

lines.speaker: Sprocket
lines.text: You want answers? The Grand Mechanism is at the center of the city. Everything connects to it — the Schedule, the citizens, the Regulator.

lines.speaker: Sprocket
lines.text: But you'll need to get past the Masterites first. They guard the approach — the Warden at the gate, the Arbiter on the main road, the Tempo... well, the Tempo finds you.

lines.speaker: Sprocket
lines.text: Head toward the clock tower. You'll know you're close when the ticking gets louder.
